title: From using AI to deploying more pumps—how BMC is preparing for monsoon this year

title: Word of the Week: Slopaganda - the AI-generated visuals of Trump and Iran flooding the internet
description: As the war between Iran and the US continues, it’s hard not to have come across the many videos on social media poking fun at the US president. What about Donald Trump’s now-deleted image of him in a Jesus-like avatar? All of this is slopaganda — propaganda material which is created with the use of artificial intelligence
content:
The Iran war has seen the deployment of missiles, drones, and other weaponry.
But this war has also seen the internet flooded with AI videos and images, racking up millions of views and drawing a lively response from audiences around the world. Every... [4511 chars]
